description: Schema-validated governance card for a rescue dataset that satisfies a declared rescue task artifact contract.

required_fields.name: schema_name
required_fields.description: Artifact schema identifier.

required_fields.name: schema_version
required_fields.description: Rescue dataset card schema version.

required_fields.name: dataset_id
required_fields.description: Stable rescue dataset identifier.

required_fields.name: dataset_label
required_fields.description: Human-readable rescue dataset label.

required_fields.name: suite_id
required_fields.description: Rescue suite identifier.

required_fields.name: task_id
required_fields.description: Rescue task identifier.

required_fields.name: contract_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the rescue task contract artifact.

required_fields.name: artifact_contract_id
required_fields.description: Artifact contract id satisfied by this dataset card.

required_fields.name: dataset_role
required_fields.description: Rescue artifact channel represented by the dataset.

required_fields.name: availability
required_fields.description: Cutoff availability class for the dataset.

required_fields.name: governance_status
required_fields.description: Whether the card is an example, planned, or active artifact.

required_fields.name: source_stage
required_fields.description: Lifecycle stage for the governed dataset.

required_fields.name: entity_type
required_fields.description: Entity type covered by the dataset.

required_fields.name: record_grain
required_fields.description: Record grain of the dataset rows.

required_fields.name: primary_key_fields
required_fields.description: Primary key columns for the dataset.

required_fields.name: contains_post_cutoff_labels
required_fields.description: Whether the dataset contains post-cutoff labels or adjudications.

required_fields.name: allowed_uses
required_fields.description: Permitted downstream uses for the dataset.

required_fields.name: freeze_manifest_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the governing rescue freeze manifest.

required_fields.name: lineage_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the raw-to-frozen lineage artifact.

required_fields.name: expected_output_path
required_fields.description: Planned or materialized output location for the dataset.

required_fields.name: file_format
required_fields.description: Declared file format for the dataset.

required_fields.name: description
required_fields.description: Short governance summary for the dataset.
